caption: In an indoor gym setting featuring blue bleachers and a polished wooden floor, a person wearing black and red sneakers is seen moving. The sequence begins with a close-up shot of the person's feet as they step forward on the gym floor. The perspective then shifts to show a black tripod with red accents standing on the wooden floor in front of the blue bleachers. As the scene progresses, the camera zooms out or repositioned to provide a wider view of the tripod, which is centered in the frame. The background remains constant, showing the tiered blue seating of the bleachers and a few scattered items on the floor. The movement transitions from a close-up of the person's footwear to a steady shot focusing on the camera equipment positioned in the gymnasium.
